sentences.text: Hey Melissa, my name is Mr. Garcia I'm calling with rental I sent you a couple of emails and the reason for the call was to set a meeting with you I work with a lot of other property management companies in terms of generating them more qualified leads and renters to the property specifically through our partnership up with Facebook and Facebook marketplace wanna run by a few options and ideas with you if you could
please return my call and Mitch with the renewal for seven zero eight two eight five three eight three ten four seven zero eight two eight five three eight three thanks bye.

Thank you for calling S P M properties providing professional property management for commercial and residential properties. Please listen to the full message as our extensions have changed please press nine for dial by directory name. If this is an actual emergency please hang up and dial nine one one for me press up to six letters of the person's last name using seven for Q and nine. You are being transferred to Melissa. You've reached the desk for Melissa Lynn Trisha property manager with Stevens property management if your tenant with and maintenance emergency, please press extension one. Two four one for non, emergency work orders, please press extension one. Two three one or visit our website W W W dot S P N properties dot. Com. If you leave a message, please allow twenty four hours for a reply, thanks and have a great day to reach this person's fax machine press three. Begin speaking after the tone then hang up. When you are finished or press any key for further options.

conversation.title: Call: Mitch  Scarski  and Melissa Lentrichia @ Stephens Property Management
